content: You are on Step 4. Remember: Do NOT run the full test suite with a long timeout. Many integration tests hang because they need live Postgres/Redis/IBKR connections. Instead: 1) Run only unit tests: `PYTHONPATH="..:." python -m pytest tests/unit/ -v --tb=short --timeout=30 -x`. 2) Skip any tests that hang. 3) If your new unit tests for the aggregator pass, move to Step 5!
